name: openttd-le-firs-validity-v0
description: Real OpenTTD/FIRS validity suite for deterministic API checks, route-construction reliability, throughput, and non-GPT Gym baselines.
notes: Toy/mock tasks are not part of this suite.
Route-builder reliability is measured once per seed/economy because it tests the physical construction primitive rather than a policy.
For a short development pass, override --tasks/--seeds and use --skip-route-builder. For release claims, run the full suite.
